transport.description: MCP transport used to connect to the server.

auth_method.description: Authentication method layered over the selected transport.

api_key_header_name.description: Header name used when auth_method is api_key.

load_tools.description: Load tools from the MCP server.

load_prompts.description: Load prompts from the MCP server.

request_timeout.description: Default MCP request timeout in seconds.

sse_read_timeout.description: SSE read timeout in seconds for HTTP-based MCP transports.

command.description: Command used when transport is stdio.

args.description: Command arguments used when transport is stdio.

env.description: Environment variables used when transport is stdio.

allowed_tool_names.description: Optional allowlist of MCP tool names exposed to Semantic Kernel.

mcp_tools.description: Cached MCP tool metadata from discovery.
